REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (661 Miramar Avenue, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Jul-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: John Boessenecker appearing for petitioner Debra Dolch. Counsel have obtained bond waivers from Philip and Albert Cingolani. He will file them after the hearing. Terms of sale stated by counsel. Sale is confirmed at $868,000.00. N/B. Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Drocco.

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Michael Freedman appearing for Albert Cingolani. James Barringer appearing for Philip Cingolani. No objections. The accounting issue is included in the settlement agreement. Matter granted. Order signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

MINI MINUTES: Michael Freedamn appearing for Albert Cingolani. James Barringer appearing for Philip Cingolani. Settlement reached after mediation. Still need one signature. Mr. Boessenecker will try to get it. Matter is continued to 3/13.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

Off Calendar Oct-31-2006 Continued To Dec-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman (Counsel for Albert Cingolani).

Mr. Freedman appeared to advise the Court of the parties' attempts to finalize a settlement in the matter and request a continuance of the matter to December 5, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 which request was granted.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT
Off Calendar May-02-2006 Continued To Jun-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Michael Freedman appearing for Albert Cingolani. James Barringer appearing for Philip Cingolani. John Boessenecker appearing for trustee Donne Rowe. With no objection to the petition for declaratory relief, court is granting that petition. Both Mr. Barringer and Mr. Boessenecker agree to provide accounting information to Mr. Freedman. They don't want to have the expense to filed a formal accounting. They will provide the informations to Mr. Freedman by 6/1. Matter is continued to 6/6 for status. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
